Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Subpoenas To Thomas Weisel Partners Group, Inc., Merrill Lynch Commodities, Inc. And Foldman Sachs Specialty Lending Holdings, Inc. Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedures
Off Calendar Mar-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRYAN VERESCHAGIN, TEL. NO. 534-5434 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KYLE E. KELLY OF THE LITTLER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 677-3197 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL EHRLICH'S MOTION To Quash Subpoenas To Thomas Weisel Partners Group, Inc., Merrill Lynch Commodities, Inc. And Foldman Sachs Specialty Lending Holdings, Inc. Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedures - Motion to quash is granted. Subpoenas are overly broad an insufficient showing of relevance to overcome the right to privacy as provided under California law. Prevailing party to prepare order. Protem Judge: Paul Renne, Not reported.
